title: Radiant Norwegian Chicken Stew
description: A spicy, silky chicken stew with green chili, infused with Norwegian flavors and low-carb friendly ingredients. Kid-friendly yet vibrant, perfect for a quick dinner.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about four minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, green chili, cumin, and smoked paprika, cooking for one minute until fragrant.
Add chicken cubes, browning them on all sides for five to six minutes.
Mix in tomato paste and fish sauce, cooking for one minute to combine flavors.
Pour in chicken broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for ten minutes.
Stir in coconut milk, reduce again, and simmer eight more minutes until the sauce thickens and chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Season the stew with salt, pepper, and dried dill, stirring to combine.
Ladle the stew into bowls and garnish with a sprinkle of dried dill.
Serve immediately, optionally accompanied by steamed cauliflower rice for a low-carb meal.
